title: Slow Roasted Canadian Jerusalem Artichoke Gratin
description: A pungent and molten keto-friendly dish featuring Jerusalem artichokes, slow roasted in a scallop shell, perfect for a cold Canadian night. This meal prep recipe is a hearty and comforting side dish or main course.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pot of boiling salted water, blanch the sliced Jerusalem artichokes for 5 minutes.
Drain the artichokes and set them aside to cool.
In a large bowl, combine the cooled artichokes, unsalted butter, Grana Padano cheese, heavy cream, salt, black pepper, and chopped thyme.
Mix well to combine, then divide the mixture among the scallop shells.
Place the filled scallop shells on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the artichokes are tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
